name: fxUSD
collateral: WBTC (majority) and wstETH deposited as collateral into f(x) Protocol CDP vaults; xPOSITIONs represent looped leveraged positions as NFTs; fully overcollateralized; WBTC custody by BitGo/Coinbase introduces centralized dependency
pegMechanism: CDP-style with overcollateralization and liquidations; f(x) Protocol Stability Pool arbitrages the USDC/fxUSD Curve pool to defend the peg; two yield strategies: (1) Curve LP with FXN gauge, (2) Stability Pool with wstETH real yield, fxSAVE autocompound, or FXN gauge; fxUSD redeemable at oracle price for underlying collateral when below peg; automatic rebalancing and liquidation of under-collateralized positions
